name: Apple Pie That's Good for You
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Thinly sliced, peeled; cored Apples (very green and sour)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a glass mixing bowl, mix the apples with the lemon juice, sugar, cinnamon, cloves, vanilla, granola, and raisins. Fill the unbaked pie shell with the apple mixture. Dot the top with margarine. Place the pie in the oven and bake for 15 minutes. Lower the oven to 350°F and bake another 20-25 minutes. Remove the pie from the oven and let cool. If desired, make a lattice topping for the pie.
